CustomField.formula: IF( AND( HasOptedOutOfEmail = FALSE, TEXT(Status__c) <> 'Do Not Contact', Account.Open_Opps_Stage_NOT_Initial_Discovery__c = 0, OR( TODAY() - Last_Activity_Date_by_GTM__c >= 30, ISBLANK(Last_Activity_Date_by_GTM__c) ), OR( TODAY() - Account.Last_Closed_Lost_Opp_Renewal__c >= 120, ISBLANK(Account.Last_Closed_Lost_Opp_Renewal__c) ), OR( TODAY() - Account.Last_Closed_Lost_Opp_Upsell_New_sale__c >= 30, ISBLANK(Account.Last_Closed_Lost_Opp_Upsell_New_sale__c) ) ), 'true', 'false' )
CustomField.label: Marketing Greenlight
